meaning: v.争论,辩论,怀疑,抗拒,阻止,争夺(土地,胜利等)n.争论,辩论,争吵
examples: She played a key role in the dispute.
The town is in uproar over the dispute.
They supported their sisters in the dispute.
The First Minister says the resolution to the dispute lies between the employers and nursery nurses.
In any scientific dispute spawned by the Endangered Species Act, the government almost always wins.
